stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: 1d and 4h remain the dominant uptrend, while 15m is a cooling balance inside that larger move. On 15m, price 2115.49 is below EMA13/21/34 (2116.35/2116.76/2117.14) and below 15m RVWAP 2116.41, the latest 15m futures delta is -2315.32 and 15m footprint delta is -2382.92, so the recent push lost momentum after buying exhaustion at 2118.49 and bearish absorption at 2120.04. I did not label 15m bearish because bullish absorption is confirmed at 2113.13-2113.65, 15m whale delta is still +905031.11 notional, and price is balancing around the 15m POC 2115.46 rather than breaking support; the nearby selling_exhaustion at 2115.46 was weaker because spot_exhaustion_confirm was false and spot_continuation_risk was true. On 4h, the bull case is cleaner: bull EMA regime, price well above 4h AVWAP 2069.32, last three 4h CVD bars are positive, 4h footprint delta is +16880.39, whales are +28078726.26, and the session is holding upper value after the IB break. On 1d, structure is bullish but less clean: price is +45.67 above 7d AVWAP, above daily TPO VAH 2112.18, and 1d whales remain strongly positive at +181679725.54 notional, but current daily CVD is negative (-22903.32 futures, -5920.72 spot) while price is higher. Net result: higher timeframes are bullish, but the immediate auction is choppy and supply is active into 2118-2123.
